summary: This document outlines the Standard Operating Procedure for purchasing goods and services within the company's Quality Management System. It details supplier qualification criteria, criticality assessment based on medical device safety and regulatory compliance, and the roles of different departments in the procurement process. The SOP ensures that all purchased items meet quality standards required for the final product.
